title: Good: Idempotent API design in lora_l2
description:
lichen_lora_l2_init(), lichen_lora_l2_start(), and lichen_lora_l2_stop() are all idempotent -- calling them multiple times is safe and returns success. This is documented in the header docstrings and prevents init-ordering bugs when the same code path may be called from multiple entry points (main.c, NET_DEVICE_INIT).

Locations:
- firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c:140-163 (init)
- firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c:165-217 (start)
- firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c:219-239 (stop)
